title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cars24 South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cars24 South Asia Partners:
Cars24 South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 South Asia Partners!
